testcase.name: Place the order
testcase.failure:
CoursePlaywright\WebAPIPart1.spec.js:26:1 › Place the order ──────────────────────────────────────
TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[routerlink*=\'cart\']')
60 | } 61 | //await page.pause(); > 62 | await page.locator("[routerlink*='cart']").click(); | ^ 63 | await page.locator("div li").first().waitFor(); 64 | const bool = await page.locator("h3:has-text('Zara Coat 3')").isVisible(); 65 | expect(bool).toBeTruthy(); at D:\2026 - Study\Playwright\Playwright-E2E\tests\CoursePlaywright\WebAPIPart1.spec.js:62:48
